MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Golden properties, LLC is present. Represented by Jim Nero.
Attorney David Wasserman appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Mariee Quintara is present.
Attorney Laura Chiera representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was not filed. The trial date of Jan. 14, 2013 vacated. (501/JPT)
